title: House Republicans Move to Eliminate Landmark U.S. Hydrogen Tax Credit in Bid to Roll Back Bidenâ€™s Climate Agenda
content: House Republicans have introduced a bill to terminate the 45V hydrogen production tax credit in 2026, years earlier than planned, threatening to derail U.S. clean hydrogen development. The bill, part of broader efforts to dismantle Bidenâ€™s Inflation Reduction Act, is set for a vote today and would eliminate up to $3/kg in hydrogen production incentives.
author: Analysts Account
